name: jetpack-theme/pricing-table
title: Pricing Table
description: Three-tier paid pricing table (Basic / Pro / Agency) with Monthly / Yearly / 2-Year billing toggle. Flat recurring pricing, no first-year discount.

sectionDescription.default: One price every year. No intro tricks, no renewal shock. Pay monthly, save every year with annual billing, or save even more with a 2-year plan.
